title: Service exports=false, START_NOT_STICKY, FLAG_IMMUTABLE all correct
description: Three Android-specific choices are all correct and should be defended: (1) android:exported=false prevents other apps from binding or starting the service. (2) START_NOT_STICKY means Android won't auto-restart the service after killing it — correct because the Flutter side tracks connection state and would be desynchronized by a surprise restart. (3) PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE is required for Android 12+ and the right default for all new PendingIntents. A well-intentioned contributor might change START_NOT_STICKY to START_STICKY to 'keep it running' — that would create a ghost service that Flutter doesn't know about.
close_reason: Design decisions recorded for reference; no code changes needed.
